Patch Set 9:

The ost-pools failure looks quota related.

Patch Set 9:

In fact, it looks like there is an inode leak in the quota code, possibly the project quota inode itself, that is causing all of the later test failures.

Patch Set 9: Code-Review-1

I’ve looked a few of these errors and requested a retest for some of the test sessions. Would you please review the following error and see if they are caused by a patch in the project quota series?

For example:
1. For the ost-pools test_23a hang at https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/30a6097a-2759-11e7-8920-5254006e85c2, in the MDS and OSS console logs, we see:
22:48:12:[18190.419279] LustreError: 0-0: lustre-OST0000: can't enable quota enforcement since space accounting isn't functional. Please run tunefs.lustre --quota on an unmounted filesystem if not done already
and then a stack trace
Could this be causing the test to hang?

Patch Set 10:

James Nunez,

lustreError: 0-0: lustre-OST0000: can't enable quota enforcement since space accounting isn't functional. Please run tunefs.lustre --quota on an unmounted filesystem if not done already

This kind of errors exist because of osd-zfs did not support project quota
lctl conf_param xxxx.mdt=ug output those messages misguarding. 

I did not trigger hang locally here, but i think hang might because of
test congestions in intel test platform and it trigger timeout.
So that 'echo c' > /proc/sysrq-trigger is runned in the MDS/client?

As i did not see any Lustre releated hang in the backtrace.

Thanks,
Shilong

parents.subject: LU-4017 quota: add project inherit attributes

commit.subject: LU-4017 quota: add project id support to lfs find
commit.message:
LU-4017 quota: add project id support to lfs find

Project ID support is added into 'lfs find', which is
needed for sanity-quota.sh etc to collect project id information
if test failed

Change-Id: I60cfc4f81bb8779db0a33a5c9bae7255e9d0100c
